subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent down His verses and manifested His proofs, and caused all things to speak forth that verily there is no God but Him, the Single, the One, the Mighty, the Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل ایاته و اظهر بیناته و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الی هو الفرد الواحد المقتدر القدیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
